sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32771" key="e)kpro/ptwsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκπρό-πτωσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n32771.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">prolapsus,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:2:85" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.85</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
